revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 3 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23127601988|commit triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Box%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} {{Lua|Module:Check for unknown parameters}} == Basic usage == {{((}}box|''Contents''}} produces: {{box|''Contents''}} == Parameters == {|class="wikitable" style="width:100%;{{#if:{{{no-special|}}}|display:none;}}" |+ Special parameters ! style="width: 8em;|Parameter ! style="width: 16em;|Description ! Values |- | {{para|type}} | The type of box | {{box|type=black|black}}, {{box|type=white|white}} or {{box|type=transparent|transparent}} |- | {{para|span}} | Uses span tags instead of div tags | {{box|span=yes|yes}} |- | {{para|wide}} | Set the box to be as wide as the page/table | {{box|wide=yes|yes}} |- | {{para|inline}} | Set the box to be inline | text text text {{box|inline=yes|yes}} text text text |- | {{para|header}} | Adds an '''optional''' header | {{box|header=Header|Text}} |- | {{para|shadow}} | Add a shadow to the box | {{box|shadow=y|yes}} |} {| class="wikitable" style="width: 100%;" |+ CSS parameters ! style="width:auto"|Parameter ! Description ! Default ! CSS |- | "content" | The contents of the box ('''Necessary''') | | |- | {{small|''opt1''}}
 {{para|background}}
{{small|''opt2''}}
 {{para|color}} | The color of the background of the box | White | background-color |- | {{para|align}} | The alignment of the box (left, center, right) ('''Recommended''') | left | float |- | {{para|padding}} | The inner padding of the border | 3px | padding |- | {{para|style}} | The style of the border | Solid | border-style |- | {{para|border color}} | The color of the border | Black | border-color |- | {{para|border size}} | The size of the border | 3px | border-width |- | {{para|text align}} | The alignment of the text ('''Recommended''') | left | text-align |- | {{para|spacing}} | The spacing of the letters | | letter-spacing |- | {{para|font}} |The font of the box's text | |font-family |- |{{para|font size}} |The font size of the box's text | |font-size |- |{{para|text color}} |The color of the text |black |text-color |- |{{para|margin}} |The outer margin of the box (Only does horizontal when type isn't inline-block or block) |3px |margin |- |{{para|box type}} |The type of box (inline, inline-block, block) |inline-block |display |- |{{para|height}} |The height of the box | |height |- |{{para|width}} |The width of the box |(The width of the text) |width |- |{{para|CSS}} |Any Additional CSS you want to add ('''make sure to add ; to end''') | | |} {| class="wikitable" style="width: 100%; |+ Other CSS parameters ! style="width: 8em;|Parameter ! Description ! Default ! CSS |- |{{para|top margin}} |The top outer margin of the box (Only does horizontal when type isn't inline-block or block) |3px |margin-top |- |{{para|bottom margin}} |The bottom outer margin of the box (Only does horizontal when type isn't inline-block or block) |3px |margin-bottom |- |{{para|left margin}} |The left outer margin of the box (Only does horizontal when type isn't inline-block or block) |3px |margin-left |- |{{para|right margin}} |The right outer margin of the box (Only does horizontal when type isn't inline-block or block) |3px |margin-right |- |{{para|top padding}} |The top inner padding of the border |3px |padding-top |- |{{para|bottom padding}} |The bottom inner padding of the border |3px |padding-bottom |- |{{para|left padding}} |The left inner padding of the border |3px |padding-left |- |{{para|right padding}} |The right inner padding of the border |3px |padding-right |- |{{para|radius}} |Border radius |0 |border-radius |- |{{para|max-height}} |The maximum height of the box | |max-height |- |{{para|min-height}} |The minimum height of the box | |min-height |- |{{para|max-width}} |The maximum width of the box | |max-width |- |{{para|min-width}} |The minimum width of the box | |min-width |} ==Examples== {{lorem}}{{box|A|background=red|text color=white}}{{box|B|background=blue|text color=orange}}{{lorem|2}}{{box|C|background=black|text color=white|margin=0px|height=1em|width=40px|border color=yellow}}{{lorem}} {{clear}} {{box|A|background=red|text color=white}} {{box|B|background=blue|text color=orange}} {{box|C|background=black|text color=white|margin=0px|height=1em|width=40px|border color=yellow}} {{clear}} ---- {{box|spacing=5px|height=50px|DOG}} {{clear}} {{box|spacing=5px|height=50px|DOG}} {{clear}} ---- {{box|background=yellow|align=center|border size=10px|radius=20px|text align=center|The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog}} {{clear}} {{box|background=yellow|align=center|border size=10px|radius=20px|text align=center|The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog}} == TemplateData == {{TemplateData header}} { "params": { "1": { "description": "The contents of the box", "example": "Hello, world!", "suggested": true }, "header": { "description": "A heading for the box", "example": "Warning", "suggested": true }, "align": { "description": "The alignment of the box", "example": "center", "default": "left", "suggested": true }, "box type": { "description": "The type of box (css display) (block, inline-block or inline)", "example": "block", "autovalue": "inline-block" }, "wide": { "description": "If set to yes the box will be wide", "example": "yes", "type": "boolean", "default": "no", "autovalue": "" }, "inline": { "description": "Set to yes for the box type to be inline", "example": "yes", "type": "boolean", "default": "no" }, "style": { "description": "The style of the border", "default": "solid" }, "padding": { "description": "The padding of the box", "default": "3px" }, "top padding": { "description": "The top padding of the box" }, "bottom padding": { "description": "The bottom padding of the box" }, "left padding": { "description": "The left padding of the box" }, "right padding": { "description": "The right padding of the box" }, "border color": { "description": "The color of the box border", "example": "red", "type": "string", "default": "black" }, "radius" : { "description": "Border corner radius", "example": "5em", "default": "0" }, "type": { "description": "The type of box (black,white,transparent)", "example": "black" }, "border size": { "description": "The size of the border", "default": "3px" }, "color": { "aliases": [ "background" ], "description": "The color of background", "example": "black", "default": "white" }, "text color": { "description": "The color of the text", "example": "green", "default": "black" }, "text align": { "description": "The alignment of the text (css text-align)", "example": "center", "default": "left" }, "spacing": { "description": "The spacing of the letters" }, "font": { "description": "The font of the text" }, "font size": { "aliases": [ "text size" ], "description": "The size of the text" }, "margin": { "description": "The size of the box's margin", "example": "30px", "default": "3px" }, "top margin": { "description": "The size of the box's top margin" }, "bottom margin": { "description": "The size of the box's bottom margin" }, "left margin": { "description": "The size of the box's left margin" }, "right margin": { "description": "The size of the box's right margin" }, "height": { "description": "The height of the box", "example": "400px", "default": "''the height of the contents plus the margin''" }, "max-height": { "description": "The maximum height of the box", "example": "800px" }, "min-height": { "description": "The minimum height of the box", "example": "100px" }, "width": { "description": "The width of the box", "default": "''the width of the text plus the margin or padding''" }, "max-width": { "description": "The maximum width of the box" }, "min-width": { "description": "The minimum width of the box" }, "CSS": { "description": "Any additional CSS to use" } }, "description": "This template produces a variety of boxes from preset options and from CSS.", "format": "inline" } ==Tracking category== * {{Category link with count|Pages using box with unknown parameters}} ==See also== * {{tl|Divbox}} * {{tl|Side box}} {{sandbox other|| }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Box templates|!]] [[Category:Templates that add a tracking category]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
